world_news.headline: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
world_news.summary: The World Health Organization said one case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed, with five more suspected cases under investigation.

world_news.headline: Merz ‘not giving up on working with Trump’ despite Iran war spat
world_news.summary:
German chancellor downplays US military drawbacks and president’s barbs in TV interview

The German chancellor, Friedrich Merz, has said he will not give up on working with the US president, Donald Trump, despite a spat between the leaders over the war in Iran.

“I am not giving up on working on the transatlantic relationship,” Merz told the public broadcaster ARD in an interview due to air on Sunday night. “Nor am I giving up on working with Donald Trump.”

Continue reading...

world_news.headline: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
world_news.summary: The US is yet to formally confirm it has responded. However, Trump reportedly told Israel's Kan News it was unacceptable.

world_news.headline: World Press Freedom Day marked in Gaza as journalist death toll rises
world_news.summary: Palestinian journalists in Gaza marked World Press Freedom Day by honouring colleagues killed and targeted by Israel.

world_news.headline: Is Israel expanding into Gaza despite ceasefire?
world_news.summary: Redi Tlhabi speaks to Ray Adams Row Farr from Forensic Architecture about Israel’s expansion into Gaza post-ceasefire.

world_news.headline: Germany’s Merz downplays rift with Washington despite US troop drawdown
world_news.summary: German chancellor says criticism of Donald Trump's strategy in Iran unrelated to troop withdrawal announcement.

world_news.headline: Israel’s strategy of ‘permanent war’: A race against time?
world_news.summary: Political analyst Daniel Levy says US policy is so ‘marinated’ in Israeli narratives, the two are indistinguishable.

world_news.headline: Israeli forces kill Palestinian man in raid on Nablus in occupied West Ban
world_news.summary: Israeli forces have raided the city of Nablus in the occupied West Bank, killing a 26-year-old man.

world_news.headline: Who shot a Secret Service officer at the Trump press dinner?
world_news.summary: Court papers do not explicitly accuse the suspect of shooting the officer, even as officials say it was not "friendly fire".

world_news.headline: Two US service members reported missing in Morocco, officials say
world_news.summary: A search and rescue operation is underway for the service members, who are believed to have been involved in an accident, according to authorities.
